## [00:00 - 03:09]

## [03:09 - 05:02]

So it all depends on when they sign up. But this is assuming someone signs up on three days before the webinar actually starts. All right. So on this day one, they get the transformational content. This is your first email where you're sending out content that helps them to achieve the transformation before they actually come to the webinar. So that they're trusting you and wanting to come. Then day two, they get your trust builder content, a web page that gives information from you on why they should know when trust you and come to that webinar. And then and that's delivered six o'clock a.m. And then in the afternoon for 45 p.m. ish, they get transformational content number two. So another piece of transformation information can help them to achieve the transformation before they actually come to the webinar. Then on the day of the webinar, they're going to get at 6am, they're going to get transformational content number three at 6am. And then one hour before the webinar, they're going to get the reminder from your webinar service, giving them the one hour, hey, it's happening in an hour. And that's your standard email that you usually don't have a lot of control over. And then 15 to 30 minutes before the webinar actually starts, you're going to send a web an email from your email auto responder service that the headline is starting now.
